builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on Dynamo's Stomp ability. Deals major spirit damage to ground based enemies from afar. Weak to long range,tanky, and aerial based heroes. Great against ground based or low HP heroes
builds.name: Stomp

builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on the Black Hole ability. The goal is to get as many enemies in big team fights to swing fights in your favor. Strong against team fight focused characters. Weak against aerial, distant, and High HP characters.
builds.name: Black Hole

builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on healing and rescuing allies. Good against continous damage and with nearby allies. Bad when allies are too spread apart or too much burst damage.
builds.name: Support
